nodes.name: Daily 7AM ET
nodes.notes: Trigger: 7:00 AM ET daily. Reads approved queue and schedules posts for the day.

nodes.name: Emergency Stop Check
nodes.notes: KILL SWITCH: Checks EMERGENCY_STOP env var. If true, notifies Discord and halts the workflow. Must be first node after trigger.

nodes.name: Emergency Stop Pre-Post
nodes.notes: KILL SWITCH: Second EMERGENCY_STOP check before scheduling items. Catches mid-execution stop activation.

nodes.name: Read Approved Queue
nodes.notes: Read approved queue items from n8n static data. No filesystem dependency for n8n Cloud compatibility.

nodes.name: Filter Today's Items
nodes.notes: Filter for items scheduled today or with no date (post ASAP). Sort by priority.

nodes.name: Items to Schedule?
nodes.notes: Stop if no items to schedule today.

nodes.name: Enforce Cadence Rules
nodes.notes: Apply cadence.md rules: max posts per account, weekend rules. Defer excess items.

nodes.name: Assign Posting Times
nodes.notes: Assign optimal posting times based on cadence.md peak windows.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN?
nodes.notes: Safe default: DRY_RUN must be strictly 'false' to schedule. Any other value (true, undefined, empty) routes to dry-run log.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN Log
nodes.notes: Prepare schedule data for Discord notification. No filesystem writes for n8n Cloud compatibility.

nodes.name: Schedule + Move Items
nodes.notes: Move items from approved to scheduled queue in static data. No filesystem dependency for n8n Cloud compatibility.

nodes.name: Discord: Schedule Summary
nodes.notes: Daily summary of scheduled and deferred posts.
